stories.headline: EU Leaders Finalize Landmark Green Transition Investment Package
stories.summary: European Union leaders concluded a summit by approving a multi-billion euro investment to accelerate green energy and climate resilience, aiming for long-term economic stability.

stories.headline: Global Tech Consortium Launches Open-Source AI Ethics Framework
stories.summary: A coalition of leading tech companies and governments unveiled a universal ethical AI framework, setting new standards for responsible development and deployment worldwide.

stories.headline: Monsoon Floods Displace Millions Across Southeast Asia
stories.summary: Record monsoon rains have caused widespread flooding in several Southeast Asian nations, leading to mass evacuations and urgent international calls for humanitarian aid.

stories.headline: Central Banks Signal Rate Stability Amid Global Inflation Moderation
stories.summary: Major central banks, including the US Federal Reserve, indicated a pause in interest rate hikes, signaling confidence in inflation control and supporting market stability.

stories.headline: New Malaria Vaccine Trial Shows Promising Efficacy in Africa
stories.summary: A phase 3 clinical trial for a novel malaria vaccine demonstrated high efficacy in several African nations, offering significant hope for reducing the disease burden.
